domain.name: Conformance
domain.description: Minimal core DNA paired with product.api.json. The Conversion resource exists so the runtime registerRoutes can wire the /v1/convert endpoint without 'unknown resource' errors. Boot completes; the endpoint is never invoked by the conformance test (only /api-json is asserted).

resources.name: Conversion
resources.description: Opaque conformance resource. Not modelled in any real domain.
